description_long: This is a modern, multi-functional wooden cabinet or shelving unit featuring a combination of light and dark wood finishes. The left section includes three open shelves, two of which are supported by metallic brackets, ideal for displaying or storing smaller items. The right section is dominated by a large, flat panel with a horizontal handle, suggesting the presence of a drawer or compartment. Below this, there are two open horizontal shelves and a larger closed compartment, providing ample storage space. The overall design is geometric and contemporary, with clean lines and a sturdy base. The contrasting wood tones and metallic accents give it a stylish, urban appeal suitable for living rooms, offices, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern, two-tone wooden cabinet with open shelves, a large drawer, and metallic accents, designed for stylish urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing all open shelves, the large drawer with handle, and the full layout of compartments.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and thickness of the cabinet, with the layered structure visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat back panel and the contrasting wood finishes, with no visible compartments.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the vertical profile and the arrangement of the shelves and compartments.
